sections.title: Set as Preferred Source on Google

content.text: BRO Various Posts Recruitment 2026 : Get complete details about BRO Various Posts Recruitment 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: Border Roads Organisation (BRO) Various Posts (Only For Males) Recruitment 2026 Advt. No. : 01/2026 Short Details of Notification
Notification Out : 20/05/2026 Starting Date : 21/05/2026 Last Date : 04/07/2026 05:00 PM Last Date (Remote Areas) : 19/07/2026 05:00 PM
Gen / OBC / EWS : 50/- SC / ST / PH : 0/- (Nil) Payment Mode : SBI Collect
Age Limit : 18-27 Years Age Limit as on : 01/06/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Written Exam Physical Efficiency Test Skill Test (If Applicable) Medical Examination Document Verification

Draughtsman : Pay Band-1, Rs 5200–20200 plus Grade pay Rs 2800/- Hindi Typist : Pay Band-1, Rs 5200–20200 plus Grade pay Rs 1900/- Store Keeper Technical : Pay Band-1, Rs 5200–20200 plus Grade pay Rs 1900/- Operator (Communication) : Pay Band-1, Rs 5200-20200 plus Grade pay Rs 1900/- Operator Excavating Machinery (OG) : Pay Band – 1, Rs. 5200-20200 plus Grade Pay Rs. 1900/- Electrician : Pay Band-1, Rs 5200-20200 plus Grade pay Rs 1900/-

Draughtsman : 12th Passed with Science, 02 Years Certificate in Architecture / Draughtsmanship OR 02 Years National Trade Certificate for Draughtsman (Civil) with 01 Year Experience. Hindi Typist : 12th Class Passed, Hindi Typing : 30 wpm. Store Keeper Technical (SKT) : 12th Passed, Having Store Keeping Knowledge Relating to Vehicles or Engineering Equipment. Operator Communication : 10th Class Passed, ITI in Wireless Operator / Radio Mechanic Trade. Operator Excavating Machinery : 10th Passed, HMV Driving License. Electrician : 10th Pass, ITI in Auto Electrician Trade with 01 Year Exp.
